beliefs.belief: Engaging in physical activity helps me clear my mind and feel energized.
beliefs.evidence: Just finished my morning jog—feeling energized!

beliefs.belief: I have an inherent desire to engage in relaxing, hands-on, creative hobbies.
beliefs.evidence: I love working with my hands.

beliefs.belief: Quality family time, especially shared activities, is the most enjoyable and valuable experience.
Work stress can easily lead to feeling overwhelmed, requiring active measures to find personal balance.
beliefs.evidence: Work has been really stressful... I need to find a better balance.

beliefs.belief: Seeking support when struggling is emotionally difficult, despite being necessary.
beliefs.evidence: It’s hard to admit when I need help.

downstream_scores.dominant_theme: Achieving and maintaining personal balance between activities, family connection, and managing work stress.
downstream_scores.suggested_follow_up: Since you've been so proactive with your hobbies and family time, what small habit could help build resilience against professional stress?
